title: Error reading properties due to OpenAI API credits
symptom: When attempting to transcribe an audio file using the OpenAI API, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'error')'. This indicates that the API call is failing due to insufficient credits.
applies_when: No credits available on OpenAI API account
not_this_if: Sufficient credits are available on the OpenAI API account
root_cause: The error occurs because the OpenAI API requires credits to process requests. If the account has no credits, the API does not return a valid response, leading to an attempt to read properties from an undefined object.
fix_steps: Check your OpenAI API account for available credits
If credits are insufficient, purchase more credits
Retry the transcription process after ensuring credits are available
agent_instruction: Ensure you have sufficient credits on your OpenAI API account before retrying the transcription.
